name: disk
description: 磁盘使用（各盘符可用空间）
command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Volume | Where-Object DriveLetter | Select-Object DriveLetter,@{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round($_.Size/1GB,1)}},@{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round($_.SizeRemaining/1GB,1)}},@{N='PctFree';E={[math]::Round(($_.SizeRemaining*100)/$_.Size,1)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String"
